metadata.description: Makes Claude pause before doing expensive work and ask: is there a smarter way? Saves up to 500x tokens by catching greedy AI behavior before it starts.

plugins.name: think-twice
plugins.description: Forces Claude to run a checklist before any high-cost task: Am I solving the right problem? Does an existing solution exist? Am I doing more than needed? Is there a simpler approach? Can it be done lazily? Tested savings: 500x on city autocomplete, 250x on fake user profiles, 16x on currency conversion, 12x on rate limiting.
